assertions.title: One live run keeps the same identity across operator surfaces

steps.action: Open /AUD/dashboard and inspect the run card shown on the operator dashboard.
steps.expected: The dashboard exposes enough visible identity to tie the completed run back to the same company, issue, agent, and run.
steps.observed: Dashboard text showed company 'AUD · 0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6', issue 'AUD-1', agent '4a710445-34ee-406a-a710-dcde1a0d42c4', and run '73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848'.

steps.action: Open /AUD/agents/ceo/dashboard and inspect the agent surface for the latest run.
steps.expected: The agent detail/dashboard shows the same latest run and linked issue identity for CEO.
steps.observed: Agent dashboard 'Latest Run' card showed companyId 0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6, issueId 476aec6a-531c-4d2c-8e8d-ec20c53cddc1, agentId 4a710445-34ee-406a-a710-dcde1a0d42c4, and runId 73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848.

steps.action: Open /AUD/issues/AUD-1 and inspect the issue detail history for the completed run.
steps.expected: Issue detail preserves an obvious link back to the same issue and completed run on the operator surface.
steps.observed: Issue detail showed issue identifier AUD-1, assignee CEO, completed run 73dd4af0, and an 'Inspect run' path tied to the same completed execution history.

steps.action: Open /AUD/agents/ceo/runs/73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848 and inspect the run detail surface.
steps.expected: Run detail preserves the same run identity and links it back to the same issue/agent/company context.
steps.observed: Run detail loaded for run 73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848, showed issue AUD-1 under 'Issues Touched', and rendered transcript/context text containing companyId 0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6, issueId 476aec6a-531c-4d2c-8e8d-ec20c53cddc1, agentId 4a710445-34ee-406a-a710-dcde1a0d42c4, and the same runId.

steps.action: Corroborate the browser-visible identifiers with local API reads for heartbeat runs, issue detail, issue runs, agent detail, run detail, and run-linked issues.
steps.expected: Raw API feeds agree on the same companyId, issueId, agentId, and runId seen in the operator surfaces.
steps.observed: Saved API transcripts and the derived summary JSON all matched the expected identifiers: companyId 0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6, issueId 476aec6a-531c-4d2c-8e8d-ec20c53cddc1/AUD-1, agentId 4a710445-34ee-406a-a710-dcde1a0d42c4 (CEO), and runId 73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848.

evidence.consoleErrors: none; the dashboard, agent dashboard, issue detail, and run detail console capture files were all empty (VAL-CROSS-007-*-console.txt).
evidence.network: Browser network captures showed the operator surfaces querying /api/companies/0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6/dashboard, /api/companies/0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6/heartbeat-runs, /api/issues/AUD-1, /api/issues/AUD-1/runs, /api/issues/AUD-1/active-run, /api/agents/ceo?companyId=0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6, /api/heartbeat-runs/73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848, and /api/heartbeat-runs/73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848/issues; corresponding evidence was saved in VAL-CROSS-007-issue-detail-network.txt and VAL-CROSS-007-run-detail-network.txt.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-007): pass. The dashboard now visibly exposes the completed run's company, issue, agent, and run identifiers, the issue/agent/run detail surfaces reconcile to the same execution, and the saved API transcripts confirm the same companyId 0e383629-ce3d-4c23-a167-68fb5a913cf6, issueId 476aec6a-531c-4d2c-8e8d-ec20c53cddc1 (AUD-1), agentId 4a710445-34ee-406a-a710-dcde1a0d42c4, and runId 73dd4af0-52b5-4052-a566-139361b55848.
